description: Fragment of a business letter addressed to [...] b. Abū ʿAlī. In Judaeo-Arabic. Rudimentary hand and spellings (e.g. לאך for לך). Mentions saffron; various other commodities and prices and shipping logistics; having sent something with Khuḍayr; various quantities in "jarawī raṭls"; balsam oil; "little ships" (muraykibāt) from al-Shām; and greetings to Abū l-Fakhr.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
